b04bfc439c8cff5b.speaker: Colette Kress
b04bfc439c8cff5b.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
b04bfc439c8cff5b.claim_text: NVIDIA's gross margin reached a record high in the first quarter.
b04bfc439c8cff5b.quote_span: our gross margin expanded to a record level

dee3759a1696f01e.speaker: Colette Kress
dee3759a1696f01e.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
dee3759a1696f01e.claim_text: NVIDIA expects gross margins to keep rising for the rest of the fiscal year.
dee3759a1696f01e.quote_span: we expect gross margins to continue climbing through the remainder of the fiscal year

214119711f9bf001.speaker: Jensen Huang
214119711f9bf001.claim_text: NVIDIA reported a record-high Data Center revenue for the quarter.
214119711f9bf001.quote_span: Data Center revenue reached a new record in the quarter as cloud service providers and enterprises raced to build out AI infrastructure.

fd352a8362362075.speaker: Jensen Huang
fd352a8362362075.claim_text: Demand for the Blackwell platform exceeds NVIDIA’s current supply capacity.
fd352a8362362075.quote_span: Demand for our Blackwell platform is extraordinary and continues to outpace what we are able to supply.
fd352a8362362075.stance: Supply constraint risk – demand outstripping supply

512b7bce41ff6de2.speaker: Jensen Huang
512b7bce41ff6de2.claim_text: Desktop gaming revenue is usually higher in the second half of the fiscal year, based on historical seasonality, though it might not repeat.
512b7bce41ff6de2.quote_span: Sure. Our desktop gaming products typically see stronger revenue in the second half of our fiscal year, consistent with historical patterns, though we always caution that past seasonality may not repeat.
512b7bce41ff6de2.stance: expects stronger H2 revenue for desktop gaming products

aba24dbaeccae947.speaker: Jensen Huang
aba24dbaeccae947.claim_text: Export controls have not had a material impact on NVIDIA’s business and no current or future licensing requirements are expected to be material.
aba24dbaeccae947.quote_span: These controls have had no material impact on our business, and we do not expect any current or future licensing requirements to be material to our results.

f655f97968887bb6.speaker: Jensen Huang
f655f97968887bb6.claim_text: NVIDIA says China is fully accessible and it sees no meaningful risk to its operations in that market.
f655f97968887bb6.quote_span: China remains fully accessible to us, and we see no meaningful risk to our operations there.

7c2436e2c304b8ca.speaker: Colette Kress
7c2436e2c304b8ca.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
7c2436e2c304b8ca.claim_text: Nvidia says it is committed to a balanced capital allocation program while continuing to invest in the business.
7c2436e2c304b8ca.quote_span: We remain committed to a balanced capital allocation program alongside our ongoing investments in the business.
7c2436e2c304b8ca.stance: affirmative commitment to balanced capital allocation

a1c444252949c477.speaker: Colette Kress
a1c444252949c477.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
a1c444252949c477.claim_text: Operating expenses will increase as the company invests in larger, more complex products, yet spending will be managed disciplinedly relative to revenue growth.
a1c444252949c477.quote_span: We expect operating expenses to grow as we invest in the largest and most complex products in our history, but we will continue to manage spending with discipline relative to revenue growth.
a1c444252949c477.stance: Expenses expected to rise; cost discipline emphasized

210f62e9da408936.speaker: Jensen Huang
210f62e9da408936.claim_text: NVIDIA claims its revenue is widely distributed among thousands of customers globally, with no significant concentration in any single customer or small group.
210f62e9da408936.quote_span: Our revenue is broadly spread across thousands of customers around the world, and no single customer or small group of customers represents a meaningful concentration of our sales.

fc0c80d1c24006e5.speaker: Colette Kress
fc0c80d1c24006e5.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
fc0c80d1c24006e5.claim_text: NVDA increased R&D spending to record levels in the quarter.
fc0c80d1c24006e5.quote_span: We continued to invest in research and development at record levels this quarter to extend our platform leadership.

596a84ebefe0751d.speaker: Colette Kress
596a84ebefe0751d.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
596a84ebefe0751d.claim_text: NVIDIA reported a strong balance sheet with substantial cash and marketable securities at quarter end.
596a84ebefe0751d.quote_span: Our balance sheet remains strong, and we ended the quarter with substantial cash and marketable securities.

dbe7b710310c44fb.speaker: Jensen Huang
dbe7b710310c44fb.claim_text: NVIDIA says its full‑stack platform and rapid innovation maintain its market lead
dbe7b710310c44fb.quote_span: We believe our full-stack platform and pace of innovation keep us ahead

64e0ad6c0c2bfdf1.speaker: Colette Kress
64e0ad6c0c2bfdf1.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
64e0ad6c0c2bfdf1.claim_text: Nvidia expects its gross margin to keep increasing for the rest of the fiscal year.
64e0ad6c0c2bfdf1.quote_span: we expect gross margins to continue climbing through the remainder of the fiscal year.

7bdde251e8a9688b.speaker: Jensen Huang
7bdde251e8a9688b.claim_text: The company expects desktop gaming revenue to be higher in the fiscal year's second half, based on historical seasonality.
7bdde251e8a9688b.quote_span: Our desktop gaming products typically see stronger revenue in the second half of our fiscal year, consistent with historical patterns, though we always caution that past seasonality may not repeat.

e3949cbff0072645.speaker: Colette Kress
e3949cbff0072645.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
e3949cbff0072645.claim_text: NVIDIA continued aggressive share repurchases this quarter, returning capital to shareholders under an expanded board authorization.
e3949cbff0072645.quote_span: On capital returns, we continued to return capital to shareholders aggressively this quarter, repurchasing shares under our expanded board authorization.

48ee3b075694d715.speaker: Jensen Huang
48ee3b075694d715.claim_text: NVIDIA asserts that despite increasing competition and custom silicon initiatives by major customers, its full‑stack platform and rapid innovation maintain its competitive lead.
48ee3b075694d715.quote_span: Competition in our markets is real and intensifying, with new entrants and custom silicon efforts from several large customers. We welcome it. We believe our full-stack platform and pace of innovation keep us ahead, but we never take our position for granted.

86ceeafc685ec10b.speaker: Company
86ceeafc685ec10b.claim_text: NVIDIA entered the data‑center CPU market in 2023 with the Grace processor.
86ceeafc685ec10b.quote_span: In 2023, we introduced our first data center CPU, Grace, built for giant-scale AI and high-performance computing, or HPC.

147d649403f582ea.speaker: Company
147d649403f582ea.claim_text: NVIDIA states it has spent more than $76.7 billion on R&D since its founding.
147d649403f582ea.quote_span: We have invested over $76.7 billion in research and development since our inception

7c34b780fcb6b047.speaker: Company
7c34b780fcb6b047.claim_text: The 2020 Mellanox acquisition broadened NVIDIA’s product portfolio to networking and created a new DPU processor class.
7c34b780fcb6b047.quote_span: Our acquisition of Mellanox in 2020 expanded our offerings to include networking, enabled our platforms to be data center scale, and led to the introduction of a new processor class - the data processing unit, or DPU.

c3064eb497c4ff62.speaker: Company
c3064eb497c4ff62.claim_text: NVIDIA launched and scaled the Blackwell Ultra platform in FY2026 for advanced AI workloads.
c3064eb497c4ff62.quote_span: In fiscal year 2026, we launched and scaled the NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra platform, optimized for agentic, reasoning, and physical AI.

d1c1a83bb4814eae.speaker: Company
d1c1a83bb4814eae.claim_text: Over 50 % of NVIDIA’s engineering staff are focused on software development.
d1c1a83bb4814eae.quote_span: More than half of our engineers work on software.
d1c1a83bb4814eae.stance: majority of engineering resources allocated to software

095c060411fddaba.speaker: Company
095c060411fddaba.claim_text: NVIDIA claims its comprehensive, end‑to‑end solution will let the transportation industry solve the complex challenges of autonomous driving.
095c060411fddaba.quote_span: We believe our comprehensive, top-to-bottom and end-to-end approach will enable the transportation industry to solve the complex problems arising from the shift to autonomous driving.

628b7bf87f64bc33.speaker: Company
628b7bf87f64bc33.claim_text: NVIDIA expects its desktop gaming revenue to be higher in the second half of the fiscal year.
628b7bf87f64bc33.quote_span: Our desktop gaming products typically see stronger revenue in the second half of our fiscal year.

aee1d10af2ba9cad.speaker: Company
aee1d10af2ba9cad.claim_text: NVIDIA follows a fabless model that depends on key suppliers for all manufacturing steps.
aee1d10af2ba9cad.quote_span: We utilize a fabless and contracting manufacturing strategy, whereby we employ and partner with key suppliers for all phases of the manufacturing process, including wafer fabrication, assembly, testing, and packaging.
aee1d10af2ba9cad.stance: relies on external suppliers to execute manufacturing

de32762629df5b21.speaker: Company
de32762629df5b21.claim_text: During growth, NVIDIA may pre‑order components with non‑cancellable contracts, pay premiums, or provide deposits to secure supply and capacity.
de32762629df5b21.quote_span: In periods of growth, we may place non-cancellable inventory orders for certain product components in advance of our historical lead times, pay premiums, or provide deposits to secure future supply and capacity and may need to continue to do so.
de32762629df5b21.stance: anticipates need to secure component supply ahead of demand

e2bb4f1e0fda1203.speaker: Company
e2bb4f1e0fda1203.claim_text: Nvidia says it has expanded its supplier base to create redundancy and resilience, ensuring long‑term manufacturing capacity for rising demand.
e2bb4f1e0fda1203.quote_span: We have expanded our supplier relationships to build redundancy and resilience in our operations to provide long-term manufacturing capacity aligned with growing customer demand.
e2bb4f1e0fda1203.stance: Expanding supplier relationships to mitigate supply‑chain risk

01daa1cc7594b70f.speaker: Company
01daa1cc7594b70f.claim_text: Nvidia acknowledges that its supply chain is currently Asia‑centric but is diversifying into the United States and Latin America.
01daa1cc7594b70f.quote_span: While currently our supply chain is mainly concentrated in Asia, we are expanding into the U.S. and Latin America.
01daa1cc7594b70f.stance: Reducing geographic concentration of supply chain

96252d7715c79698.speaker: Company
96252d7715c79698.claim_text: Nvidia expects competition to intensify from current rivals and new entrants offering lower‑priced or higher‑performance products.
96252d7715c79698.quote_span: We expect competition to increase from both existing competitors and new market entrants with products that may be lower priced than ours or may provide better performance or additional features not provided by our products.

f752044ac2df147d.speaker: Company
f752044ac2df147d.claim_text: Nvidia warns that new competitors or alliances could arise and capture a sizable share of the market.
f752044ac2df147d.quote_span: In addition, it is possible that new competitors or alliances among competitors could emerge and acquire significant market share.

7ad25843389f1c66.speaker: Company
7ad25843389f1c66.claim_text: Nvidia asserts that some rivals possess superior resources and adaptability, leading to a more competitive future environment.
7ad25843389f1c66.quote_span: Some of our competitors may have greater marketing, financial, distribution and manufacturing resources than we do and may be more able to adapt to customers or technological changes. We expect an increasingly competitive environment in the future.
7ad25843389f1c66.stance: predicts heightened competition due to rivals' strengths

94a79c33987794c9.speaker: Company
94a79c33987794c9.claim_text: Nvidia notes that rivals might have superior marketing, financial, distribution and manufacturing resources and greater adaptability.
94a79c33987794c9.quote_span: Some of our competitors may have greater marketing, financial, distribution and manufacturing resources than we do and may be more able to adapt to customers or technological changes.

d322295d68672354.speaker: Company
d322295d68672354.claim_text: NVIDIA anticipates that competition will intensify in the coming years.
d322295d68672354.quote_span: We expect an increasingly competitive environment in the future.

06795ff230e09210.speaker: Company
06795ff230e09210.claim_text: NVIDIA lists AMD, Huawei, and Intel as key hardware and software suppliers for its GPU and AI solutions.
06795ff230e09210.quote_span: • suppliers and licensors of hardware and software for discrete and integrated GPUs, custom chips and other accelerated computing solutions, including solutions offered for AI, such as Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., or AMD, Huawei Technologies Co. Ltd., or Huawei, and Intel Corporation, or Intel;
06795ff230e09210.stance: identifies reliance on specific chip and software suppliers

a3d17d14b5c4631d.speaker: Company
a3d17d14b5c4631d.claim_text: NVidia relies on suppliers of Arm‑based CPUs and on major tech companies like Amazon, Huawei, and Microsoft for its hardware and software components.
a3d17d14b5c4631d.quote_span: • suppliers of Arm-based CPUs and companies that incorporate hardware and software for CPUs as part of their internal solutions or platforms, such as Amazon, Huawei, and Microsoft;
a3d17d14b5c4631d.stance: identifies key suppliers indicating supply‑chain dependence

409d668bfc7f1819.speaker: Company
409d668bfc7f1819.claim_text: NVIDIA relies on a diverse set of external suppliers and internal design teams for its SoC components across multiple end markets.
409d668bfc7f1819.quote_span: • suppliers of hardware and software for SoC products that are used in servers or embedded into automobiles, autonomous machines, and gaming devices, such as Ambarella, Inc., AMD, Broadcom, Intel, Qualcomm Incorporated, Renesas Electronics Corporation, and Samsung, or companies with internal teams designing SoC products for their own products and services, such as Tesla, Inc.; and
409d668bfc7f1819.stance: Company depends on multiple external and internal SoC suppliers

942b63c033be9eb7.speaker: Company
942b63c033be9eb7.claim_text: NVIDIA recorded a $4.5 billion charge in Q1 FY2026 due to export‑license requirements that reduced demand for its H20 products.
942b63c033be9eb7.quote_span: As a result of these requirements, we incurred a $4.5 billion charge in the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 associated with H20 for excess inventory and purchase obligations, as the demand for H20 products diminished.
942b63c033be9eb7.stance: incurred $4.5B charge because of export licensing restrictions

789937cc8b0fdeb4.speaker: Company
789937cc8b0fdeb4.claim_text: Nvidia reports about $60 million of H20 product revenue from the U.S. government‑granted licenses.
789937cc8b0fdeb4.quote_span: We generated approximately $60 million in H20 revenue under those licenses.

9150980377a7156c.speaker: Company
9150980377a7156c.claim_text: U.S. officials expect to collect at least 15% of revenue from licensed sales, though no formal regulation exists.
9150980377a7156c.quote_span: USG officials expressed an expectation that the USG will receive 15% or more of the revenue generated from licensed sales of our products, but the USG did not publish a regulation codifying such requirement.
9150980377a7156c.stance: government revenue‑share expectation without codified rule

01e883b4b7877b35.speaker: Company
01e883b4b7877b35.claim_text: The company has generated no revenue from the H200 licensing program and is uncertain if imports to China will be permitted.
01e883b4b7877b35.quote_span: To date, we have not generated any revenue under the H200 licensing program, and do not yet know whether any imports will be allowed into China.
01e883b4b7877b35.stance: No revenue generated yet; import uncertainty

b5e5f566d121842b.speaker: Company
b5e5f566d121842b.claim_text: H200 shipments under the new license will face a 25% U.S. import tariff.
b5e5f566d121842b.quote_span: As a result, any H200 shipped under the new licensing program will be subject to a 25% tariff upon importation into the United States.

522b591d98474e81.speaker: Company
522b591d98474e81.claim_text: If we sell licensed products in China we may be unable to pass tariffs to customers and could face litigation, higher costs, and a weakened competitive position.
522b591d98474e81.quote_span: In the event that we are able to sell licensed products into the China market, we may not be able to pass along all or any of the tariff to our customers, and may be subject to litigation, increased costs, and a harmed competitive position.
522b591d98474e81.stance: Potential negative regulatory/legal and cost impact

791f5cc2e735f892.speaker: Company
791f5cc2e735f892.claim_text: A forthcoming replacement rule could add restrictions or licensing requirements that would materially affect NVIDIA’s business and financial results.
791f5cc2e735f892.quote_span: The replacement rule may impose new restrictions on our products or operations and/or add license requirements that could have a material impact on our business, operating results, and financial condition.

4b25ad1ef1fad7b5.speaker: Company
4b25ad1ef1fad7b5.claim_text: The GAIN AI Act would limit the administration’s ability to modify export controls and could enable private individuals to challenge licensing and foreign‑policy decisions.
4b25ad1ef1fad7b5.quote_span: The GAIN AI Act would restrict the Trump Administration's ability to adapt the Biden Administration's export control rules, and could also allow private U.S. persons to review and overturn licensing and foreign policy decisions made by the Trump Administration.

2993b1c0927b7fbc.speaker: Company
2993b1c0927b7fbc.claim_text: Licensing requirements could advantage competitors and cause customers in China, the Middle East and other regions to switch to alternative semiconductor suppliers.
2993b1c0927b7fbc.quote_span: The licensing requirements have already and may in the future benefit certain of our competitors, as the licensing process will make our pre-sale and post-sale technical support efforts more cumbersome and less certain and encourage customers in China, the Middle East, and other regions to pursue alternatives to our products, including semiconductor suppliers based in China, Europe, and Israel.
2993b1c0927b7fbc.stance: Licensing risk may erode NVIDIA's market share

ce639ad663c9a50c.speaker: Company
ce639ad663c9a50c.claim_text: The company says its revenue is concentrated among a few partners and customers, and losing any of them would negatively impact revenue.
ce639ad663c9a50c.quote_span: • A significant amount of our revenue stems from a limited number of partners and distributors and we have a concentration of sales to customers who purchase directly or indirectly from us, and our revenue could be adversely affected if we lose or are prevented from selling to any of these customers.

efe9957aefb183f6.speaker: Company
efe9957aefb183f6.claim_text: Revenue is concentrated among a limited number of partners and distributors, and losing any could negatively impact revenue.
efe9957aefb183f6.quote_span: We receive a significant amount of our revenue from a limited number of partners and distributors and we have a concentration of sales to customers who purchase directly or indirectly from us, and our revenue could be adversely affected if we lose or are prevented from selling to any of these customers.
efe9957aefb183f6.stance: Revenue risk due to customer concentration

ff69ebfbea2b65b5.speaker: Company
ff69ebfbea2b65b5.claim_text: NVIDIA's gross margin fell in FY2026 due to a shift from Hopper HGX to Blackwell datacenter products.
ff69ebfbea2b65b5.quote_span: Gross margin decreased in fiscal year 2026 as our business model transitioned from offering Hopper HGX systems to Blackwell full-scale datacenter solutions.
ff69ebfbea2b65b5.stance: gross margin decline linked to product transition

881a76b036298130.speaker: Company
881a76b036298130.claim_text: The margin drop was partly caused by a $4.5 billion charge for H20 excess inventory and related purchase obligations.
881a76b036298130.quote_span: The gross margin decrease was also impacted by a $4.5 billion charge associated with H20 excess inventory and purchase obligations.
881a76b036298130.stance: margin decline attributed to large inventory charge

ca669a62d2b9b76a.speaker: Company
ca669a62d2b9b76a.claim_text: AMD reports FY2025 client revenue of $10.6 billion, a 51% year‑over‑year increase from $7.1 billion in FY2024, driven by higher unit shipments (+15%) and higher average selling price (+31%).
ca669a62d2b9b76a.quote_span: Client net revenue of $10.6 billion in 2025 increased by 51%, compared to net revenue of $7.1 billion in 2024, primarily driven by a 15% increase in unit shipments of processors and a 31% increase in average selling price of processors, reflecting strong demand for AMD desktop and mobile Ryzen processors.

7cb9ec97f6e2aca3.speaker: Company
7cb9ec97f6e2aca3.claim_text: AMD reports that 2025 net revenue grew 34% year‑over‑year to $34.6 bn.
7cb9ec97f6e2aca3.quote_span: In 2025, we delivered strong annual revenue growth with net revenue increasing 34% to $34.6 billion, compared to $25.8 billion in 2024.

dfee3e9e039eb7cc.speaker: Company
dfee3e9e039eb7cc.claim_text: Data Center revenue rose 32% to $16.6 bn in 2025 versus $12.6 bn in 2024.
dfee3e9e039eb7cc.quote_span: Data Center net revenue of $16.6 billion increased by 32% compared to $12.6 billion in 2024, primarily driven by strong demand for our 5th generation AMD EPYC™ processors and AMD Instinct™ MI350 Series GPUs.

6aa7ad8406dd0810.speaker: Company
6aa7ad8406dd0810.claim_text: Embedded segment revenue fell 3% to $3.5 bn in 2025 versus $3.6 bn in 2024.
6aa7ad8406dd0810.quote_span: Embedded net revenue of $3.5 billion decreased by 3% compared to net revenue of $3.6 billion in 2024, as certain end market demand remained mixed.

141a8a7e92503457.speaker: Company
141a8a7e92503457.claim_text: Client and Gaming revenue jumped 51% to $14.6 bn in 2025 from $9.6 bn in 2024.
141a8a7e92503457.quote_span: Client and Gaming segment net revenue of $14.6 billion in 2025 increased by 51% compared to $9.6 billion in 2024, primarily driven by strong demand for our AMD Ryzen™ processors, semi-custom game consoles SoCs and Radeon™ gaming GPUs.

76e571f076c8d836.speaker: Company
76e571f076c8d836.claim_text: AMD reports its gross margin rose to 50% in 2025, a 1‑point increase from 2024, driven mainly by product mix despite $440 million in inventory and export‑control charges.
76e571f076c8d836.quote_span: Gross margin of 50% increased by 1% compared to 49% in 2024, primarily due to product mix partially offset by approximately $440 million of net inventory and related charges associated with the U.S. government export control on AMD Instinct™ MI308 Data Center GPU products.

329e1ef72c941a32.speaker: Company
329e1ef72c941a32.claim_text: AMD made strategic acquisitions to enhance its software capabilities and AI technologies across the stack.
329e1ef72c941a32.quote_span: We also made strategic investments through acquisitions to further advance our software capabilities including compiler and AI expertise in machine learning, inference and performance optimization, and enable highly optimized solutions across the stack; to scale our ability to support and develop a variety of photonics and co-packaged optics solutions across next-gen AI systems; and to bring deep expertise in high-speed inference and reasoning-based AI technologies for large-scale deployments, reinforcing our enterprise AI software stack.
329e1ef72c941a32.stance: AMD pursued acquisitions to strengthen its software/AI stack.

17bcea286c535fef.speaker: Company
17bcea286c535fef.claim_text: AMD designates Sanmina as its preferred manufacturing partner for complex AI solutions.
17bcea286c535fef.quote_span: Sanmina will also be our preferred partner for manufacturing capabilities in building complex AI solutions.
17bcea286c535fef.stance: commits to partnering with Sanmina for AI manufacturing

2ffc8c083de39f74.speaker: Company
2ffc8c083de39f74.claim_text: AMD acquired ZT Systems in March 2025 for $3.2 billion plus stock.
2ffc8c083de39f74.quote_span: In March 2025, we completed the acquisition of ZT Systems for $3.2 billion in cash and 8.3 million shares of our common stock.
2ffc8c083de39f74.stance: adds ZT Systems to AMD’s portfolio

e72d5d63e0a2d793.speaker: Company
e72d5d63e0a2d793.claim_text: AMD expects to recognize $167 million of revenue from long‑term performance obligations over the next 12 months.
e72d5d63e0a2d793.quote_span: As of March 28, 2026, the aggregate transaction price allocated to remaining performance obligations under contracts with an original expected duration of more than one year was $ 264 million, of which $ 167 million is expected to be recognized in the next 12 months.

7a5181b7a1f074fe.speaker: Company
7a5181b7a1f074fe.claim_text: The company claims it can be profitable while maintaining gross margins far below those of typical retailers.
7a5181b7a1f074fe.quote_span: these volumes and turnover enable us to operate profitably at significantly lower gross margins (net sales less merchandise costs) than most other retailers.
7a5181b7a1f074fe.stance: profitable at lower gross margins than peers

7ece0ad942a8aa99.speaker: Company
7ece0ad942a8aa99.claim_text: The cross‑docking process generates freight volume and handling efficiencies, reducing costs.
7ece0ad942a8aa99.quote_span: This process creates freight volume and handling efficiencies, lowering
7ece0ad942a8aa99.stance: Improves supply‑chain efficiency and lowers costs

ef04b80d51d5931b.speaker: Company
ef04b80d51d5931b.claim_text: The company asserts its inventory shrinkage is significantly lower than that of typical retail operations.
ef04b80d51d5931b.quote_span: we believe our inventory losses (shrinkage) are well below those of typical retail operations.

d34987eb5e51839d.speaker: Company
d34987eb5e51839d.claim_text: Compensation and benefits are the company's largest expense after merchandise costs, indicating a significant portion of the cost structure.
d34987eb5e51839d.quote_span: "Take Care of Our Employees," is a key component of our code of ethics and is fundamental to our commitment to "Take Care of Our Members." Compensation and benefits for employees is our largest expense after the cost of merchandise and is carefully monitored.

070545dfa534cad8.speaker: Company
070545dfa534cad8.claim_text: The company had 341,000 employees worldwide at the end of 2025.
070545dfa534cad8.quote_span: At the end of 2025, we employed 341,000 employees worldwide.

0aee9c0d0083a68b.speaker: Company
0aee9c0d0083a68b.claim_text: The company aims for at least half of its workforce to be full‑time.
0aee9c0d0083a68b.quote_span: a target ratio of at least 50% of our base being full-time employees.
0aee9c0d0083a68b.stance: seeks to maintain ≥50% full‑time employee base

a4316ea67f5fa523.speaker: Company
a4316ea67f5fa523.claim_text: The firm reports a 94% retention rate for U.S. and Canada employees with one‑year tenure in 2025.
a4316ea67f5fa523.quote_span: In 2025, in the U.S. and Canada that rate was approximately 94% for employees who have been with us for at least one year.

cd46c4195eb334d7.speaker: Company
cd46c4195eb334d7.claim_text: Costco’s warehouse footprint is heavily weighted toward the United States, where 637 of its 928 global locations are situated.
cd46c4195eb334d7.quote_span: At May 10, 2026, Costco operated 928 warehouses worldwide: 637 in the United States (U.S.) located in 47 states, Washington, D.C., and Puerto Rico, 115 in Canada, 42 in Mexico, 37 in Japan, 29 in the United Kingdom (U.K.), 20 in Korea, 15 in Australia, 14 in Taiwan, seven in China, five in Spain, three in France, two in Sweden and one each in Iceland and New Zealand.

1c155cc6834a73fe.speaker: Company
1c155cc6834a73fe.claim_text: The company acknowledges that actual legal losses could exceed the amount it has accrued for those liabilities.
1c155cc6834a73fe.quote_span: There may be actual losses in excess of amounts accrued.

0be8bb2635632c65.speaker: Company
0be8bb2635632c65.claim_text: The company acknowledges a reasonable possibility of incurring a loss from the contingency.

09c4bc7a968e4f38.speaker: Company
09c4bc7a968e4f38.claim_text: The company expects that pending lawsuits will not materially harm its finances, though a worst‑case outcome could cause a material charge in a single quarter or year.
09c4bc7a968e4f38.quote_span: The Company does not believe that any pending claim, proceeding or litigation, either alone or in the aggregate, will have a material adverse effect on the Company's financial position, results of operations or cash flows; it is possible that an unfavorable outcome of some or all of the matters, however unlikely, could result in a charge that might be material to the results of an individual fiscal quarter or year.

694695947e9692ca.speaker: Company

694695947e9692ca.quote_span: To protect gross margins from fluctuations in foreign exchange rates, the Company may use forwards, options or other instruments, and may designate these instruments as cash flow hedges. The Company generally hedges portions of its forecasted foreign currency exposure associated with revenue and inventory purchases, typically for up to 12 months.
694695947e9692ca.stance: will hedge FX to protect gross margins

4912602c4ff725b4.quote_span: We are subject to numerous United States (US) federal, state, and local, as well as foreign laws, and regulations covering a wide variety of subjects, and the scope of this coverage continues to broaden with continuing new legal and regulatory developments in the US and internationally.

a47d298d36c30220.speaker: Company
a47d298d36c30220.claim_text: Google anticipates recognizing slightly more than half of its $467.6 billion revenue backlog within the next 24 months, with the balance recognized later.
a47d298d36c30220.quote_span: We expect to recognize just over 50 % of the revenue backlog as revenues over the next 24 months with the remainder to be recognized thereafter.

ef1cfe963e5ec70a.speaker: Company
ef1cfe963e5ec70a.claim_text: As of March 31 2026, Google’s revenue backlog totaled $467.6 billion, of which $462.3 billion was attributed to Google Cloud.
ef1cfe963e5ec70a.quote_span: As of March 31, 2026, we had $ 467.6 billion of remaining performance obligations ("revenue backlog"), of which $ 462.3 billion related to Google Cloud.

d8c4b5d97b684e8c.speaker: Company
d8c4b5d97b684e8c.claim_text: Google expects future fixed or minimum guaranteed supply and energy commitments totaling $232.7 billion.
d8c4b5d97b684e8c.quote_span: As of March 31, 2026, expected future fixed or minimum guaranteed commitments under these agreements were $ 232.7 billion.

3830f900e15a84cc.speaker: Company
3830f900e15a84cc.claim_text: Google expects non‑advertising revenues to keep growing, which could impact its margins.
3830f900e15a84cc.quote_span: our expectation that the revenues that we derive beyond advertising will continue to increase and may affect our margins;

3194be8a279db3e2.speaker: Company
3194be8a279db3e2.claim_text: Google expects its traffic acquisition costs and TAC rate to fluctuate, which could affect overall margins.
3194be8a279db3e2.quote_span: • our expectation that our traffic acquisition costs (TAC) and the associated TAC rate will fluctuate, which could affect our overall margins;

a69bd20f2fa73a5f.speaker: Company
a69bd20f2fa73a5f.claim_text: Monetization trends are expected to fluctuate and may impact the company's revenue and margins.
a69bd20f2fa73a5f.quote_span: our expectation that our monetization trends will fluctuate, which could affect our revenues and margins;

c16ea3ffa442604f.speaker: Company
c16ea3ffa442604f.claim_text: The company plans to keep investing in new businesses, products, services, technologies, systems, acquisitions, and strategic investments.
c16ea3ffa442604f.quote_span: our plans to continue to invest in new businesses, products, services and technologies, and systems, as well as to continue to invest in acquisitions and strategic investments;

9eaba122019d1606.speaker: Company
9eaba122019d1606.claim_text: The company says its hiring pace is accelerating and it will provide competitive compensation programs.
9eaba122019d1606.quote_span: • our pace of hiring and our plans to provide competitive compensation programs;

1fdf706109e5a739.speaker: Company
1fdf706109e5a739.claim_text: Legal proceedings involving the company could damage its business, financial condition, and operating results.
1fdf706109e5a739.quote_span: including the possibility that certain legal proceedings to which we are a party could harm our business, financial condition, and operating results;
1fdf706109e5a739.stance: Potential negative impact from legal risk

deda91fb425c7796.speaker: Company
deda91fb425c7796.claim_text: Amazon identifies selection, price, and fast reliable fulfillment as the main competitive factors in its retail business.
deda91fb425c7796.quote_span: We believe that the principal competitive factors in our retail businesses include selection, price, and convenience, including fast and reliable fulfillment.

d430ace253c0a137.speaker: Company
d430ace253c0a137.claim_text: Amazon acknowledges that many competitors possess larger resources, longer track records, larger customer bases, stronger brand recognition, and better control of critical inputs.
d430ace253c0a137.quote_span: Some of our current and potential competitors have greater resources, longer histories, more customers, greater brand recognition, and greater control over inputs critical to our various businesses.

2e759ea52b94017f.speaker: Company
2e759ea52b94017f.claim_text: Amazon warns that competitors can obtain superior supplier terms, use aggressive pricing, limit Amazon’s supply access, steer customers to their own products, lock in customers, and invest more in technology and logistics.
2e759ea52b94017f.quote_span: They may secure better terms from suppliers, adopt more aggressive pricing, pursue restrictive distribution agreements that restrict our access to supply, direct consumers to their own offerings instead of ours, lock-in potential customers with restrictive terms, and devote more resources to technology, infrastructure, fulfillment, and marketing.

69a657a282a4876d.speaker: Company
69a657a282a4876d.claim_text: Amazon had about 1.576 million employees at the end of 2025.
69a657a282a4876d.quote_span: As of December 31, 2025, we employed approximately 1,576,000 full-time and part-time employees.

2009059b9a82d935.speaker: Company
2009059b9a82d935.claim_text: Amazon states that competition for technical talent is intense and labor markets are constrained.
2009059b9a82d935.quote_span: Competition for qualified personnel is intense, particularly for software engineers, computer scientists, and other technical staff (including for artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies), and constrained labor markets have increased competition for personnel across other parts of our business.

dc369033c944f572.speaker: Company
dc369033c944f572.claim_text: Amazon states it is investing in safety improvements, including capital improvements and new safety technology.
dc369033c944f572.quote_span: we continue to invest in safety improvements such as capital improvements, new safety technology, vehicle safety controls, and engineering ergonomic solutions.

27a7b092564c341e.speaker: Company
27a7b092564c341e.claim_text: Competitors have more resources, longer histories, larger customer bases, and stronger brand recognition, especially for Amazon's new products and in newer regions.
27a7b092564c341e.quote_span: Some of our current and potential competitors have greater resources, longer histories, more customers, and/or greater brand recognition, particularly with our newly-launched products and services and in our newer geographic regions.

caf03ba92c12173a.speaker: Company
caf03ba92c12173a.claim_text: Increased competition could cause Amazon to lose business, increase spending, or lower prices, potentially reducing its sales and profits.
caf03ba92c12173a.quote_span: As a result of competition, our product and service offerings may not be successful, we may fail to gain or may lose business, and we may be required to increase our spending or lower prices, any of which could materially reduce our sales and profits.
caf03ba92c12173a.stance: Negative impact on sales and profitability due to heightened competition

c372d0bd5b960089.speaker: Company
c372d0bd5b960089.claim_text: The company says some energy contracts cannot be included in derivative guidance until regulators approve them.
c372d0bd5b960089.quote_span: Certain of our energy contracts are subject to regulatory approval and are exempt from derivative guidance until the approval is obtained.
c372d0bd5b960089.stance: Regulatory approval is required before these contracts can be accounted for under derivative guidance.

33c8679413360fac.speaker: Company
33c8679413360fac.claim_text: Amazon reports unrecognized long‑term contract commitments of about $364 billion as of 31 Mar 2026.
33c8679413360fac.quote_span: For contracts with original terms that exceed one year, those commitments not yet recognized were approximately $ 364 billion as of March 31, 2026.
33c8679413360fac.stance: anticipates future revenue from $364 B of unrecognized commitments

46d5553f8d1b500f.speaker: Company
46d5553f8d1b500f.claim_text: Amazon states it has AWS‑related performance obligations for future services that are not yet recognized in the financial statements.
46d5553f8d1b500f.quote_span: Additionally, we have performance obligations, primarily related to AWS, associated with commitments in customer contracts for future services that we expect to fulfill but have not yet been recognized in our financial statements.
46d5553f8d1b500f.stance: expects to fulfill future AWS service commitments

d91fce6f4524cfdc.speaker: Company
d91fce6f4524cfdc.claim_text: Amazon is assessing how the new FASB accounting standard will affect its expense disclosures.
d91fce6f4524cfdc.quote_span: We are currently evaluating the ASU to determine its impact on our disclosures.

2cbdc3ae06a6aca6.speaker: Company
2cbdc3ae06a6aca6.claim_text: Amazon acknowledges that the result of ongoing regulatory and legal controversies could differ significantly from what the company expects.
2cbdc3ae06a6aca6.quote_span: Due to the inherent complexity and uncertainty of these matters and the judicial and regulatory processes in certain jurisdictions, the final outcome of any such controversies may be materially different from our expectations.

d31fdc3dabd1c100.speaker: Company
d31fdc3dabd1c100.claim_text: Amazon acknowledges that it is intermittently involved in legal claims, proceedings, and litigation, as outlined in its 2025 Annual Report.
d31fdc3dabd1c100.quote_span: The Company is involved from time to time in claims, proceedings, and litigation, including the matters described in Item 8 of Part II, "Financial Statements and Supplementary Data - Note 7 - Commitments and Contingencies - Legal Proceedings" of our 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K, as supplemented by the following:

405d15832386bd38.speaker: Company
405d15832386bd38.claim_text: Amazon states it is regularly subject to claims, litigation and government investigations that could result in regulatory proceedings across various legal areas.
405d15832386bd38.quote_span: In addition, we are regularly subject to claims, litigation, and other proceedings, including government inquiries and investigations that could lead to the foregoing and potential regulatory proceedings, involving patent and other intellectual property matters, taxes, labor and employment, competition and antitrust, privacy and data protection, consumer protection, commercial disputes, goods and services offered by us and by third parties, and other matters.
405d15832386bd38.stance: exposes the company to regulatory/legal risk

aa85f872fed4d11c.speaker: Company
aa85f872fed4d11c.claim_text: Amazon reported an inventory write‑down of $3.0 billion at year‑end 2024, up from $2.9 billion at the end of Q3 2025.
aa85f872fed4d11c.quote_span: The inventory valuation allowance, representing a write-down of inventory, was $ 3.0 billion and $ 2.9 billion as of December 31, 2024 and September 30, 2025.

679e464dc09b6f21.speaker: Company
679e464dc09b6f21.claim_text: Amazon had about $200 billion of unrecognized AWS contract commitments as of September 30 2025.
679e464dc09b6f21.quote_span: those commitments not yet recognized were approximately $ 200 billion as of September 30, 2025.

71914c4da94cb65f.speaker: Company
71914c4da94cb65f.claim_text: Amazon plans to adopt the new ASC tax disclosure update retroactively.
71914c4da94cb65f.quote_span: We expect to adopt the ASU on a retroactive basis.
71914c4da94cb65f.stance: intent to comply retroactively with new tax disclosure regulation

5f4859018cd844f4.speaker: Company
5f4859018cd844f4.claim_text: Amazon cautions that the results of tax disputes could differ significantly from its expectations due to complex and uncertain regulatory processes.
5f4859018cd844f4.quote_span: Due to the inherent complexity and uncertainty of these matters and the judicial and regulatory processes in certain jurisdictions, the final outcome of any such controversies may be materially different from our expectations.
5f4859018cd844f4.stance: Risks that outcomes may be materially different from expectations

046a71338b6e9b75.speaker: Company
046a71338b6e9b75.claim_text: Amazon states it is periodically involved in legal claims and proceedings, as disclosed in its recent 10‑K and 10‑Q filings.
046a71338b6e9b75.quote_span: The Company is involved from time to time in claims, proceedings, and litigation, including the matters described in Item 8 of Part II, "Financial Statements and Supplementary Data - Note 7 - Commitments and Contingencies - Legal Proceedings" of our 2024 Annual Report on Form 10-K and in Item 1 of Part I, "Financial Statements - Note 4 - Commitments and Contingencies - Legal Proceedings" of our Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for the periods ended March 31, 2025 and June 30, 2025, as supplemented by the following:

c9d6ab514e2edc35.speaker: Company
c9d6ab514e2edc35.claim_text: Amazon notes that antitrust lawsuits have been filed against it in multiple countries since March 2020, alleging price fixing, abuse of dominance, and consumer‑protection violations.
c9d6ab514e2edc35.quote_span: Since March 2020, private litigants, state Attorneys General, and the Federal Trade Commission have filed cases in the U.S., Canada, and the United Kingdom alleging, among other things: price fixing arrangements between each of Amazon and its vendors and Amazon and its third-party sellers; abuse of dominance, monopolization, and attempted monopolization; and consumer protection and unjust enrichment claims, in violation of federal and state antitrust, state consumer protection, and
